mapper.select: SELECT * FROM menu_image WHERE menu_idx = #{menuIdx} ORDER BY display_order
SELECT * FROM menu_image WHERE menu_idx = #{menuIdx} AND is_primary = TRUE ORDER BY display_order LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu_image( menu_idx, image_url, is_primary, display_order ) VALUES ( #{menuIdx}, #{imageUrl}, #{isPrimary}, #{displayOrder} )
